nasb.text: And indeed if they had been thinking of that country from which they went out, they would have had opportunity to return.

esv.text: If they had been thinking of that land from which they had gone out, they would have had opportunity to return.

cnv.text: 如果他們懷念已經離開了的地方，還有可以回去的機會。

ccb.text: 如果他们想念的是自己离开的家乡，就找机会回去了。

csbs.text: 如果他们真是想念自己所离开的地方，他们还有机会回去；
